name: rotates
_disabled_reason: LIVE-BLOCKED on an engine-side gap (not the ROS action backend, which is live-proven via executor-ros tests/live_action.rs + this demo's rotate job completing in ~400ms with 46 feedback OutputSet events). The rotate node is BOTH pooled (ros_fleet presence-pool capacity — required to route to the ROS runner) AND stream_output (feeds a StreamFold). That combination — a pooled streaming node + StreamFold gather + capacity release — wedges the net in an infinite eval loop (BRIDGE_TARGET_NET_MISSING on the capacity bridges). demo-14's streaming producer is NOT pooled, so this interaction was never exercised. Re-enable once the pooled-streamOutput + StreamFold engine integration is fixed.
